title: localization — field classification
description: Language + WorkspaceLocale are metadata. Translation values may contain workspace-specific copy which could inadvertently include PII — responsibility on workspace admins.

confidential: Translation.value (workspace-authored copy; may reference internal-only terminology)
restricted: Translation.value when key namespace = 'content' (user-generated content translations)

notes: Workspace admins are responsible for ensuring no PII passes through auto-translate. The RedactorProcessor (from telemetry-logs) is reused before dispatching to drivers; regex patterns strip credit-card / SSN / IBAN + configurable phone / email masking.
The 'content' namespace is a convention for user-generated content translations — UI translations (namespaces 'validation', 'auth', 'users', etc.) are safe.
GDPR Art. 44 (cross-border transfers): all drivers offer EU-region processing; workspaces in EU should configure eu-region drivers.
